roundup.title: GLM-5.2 Tops Open Benchmarks, Agent Harnesses Mature
roundup.subtitle: 开源模型性能拉近差距，Agent 工具链与本地部署成焦点
headline: @ValsAI 报告 GLM-5.2 在 Vibe Code Bench v1.1 拿下 64% 分数，领先下一开源模型 14 个百分点，同时在多个真实世界基准登顶。@ArtificialAnlys 新基准 AA-Briefcase 显示其 Elo 1266，位列开放权重前列。
@UnslothAI 与 @danielhanchen 同时发布 GLM-5.2 量化版本，2-bit 模型从 1.51TB 压缩至 238GB（-84%），保留约 82% 精度，可在 256GB Mac 上直接运行。@hwchase17 推荐用 model-agnostic harness dcode 测试该模型，避免 proprietary harness 偏差。
@cursor_ai 推出 /automate 技能，让 Agent 用自然语言配置触发器与 GitHub 集成；@claudeai 同步发布 Claude Code Artifacts，支持团队共享交互式 PR 面板与项目仪表盘。
@OpenAI 与 @cloneofsimo 合作论文显示 o3 Deep Research 在罕见儿科病例中帮助临床医生重新诊断，@OpenAINewsroom 确认该工作已在 NEJM AI 发表。

deepDives.title: GLM-5.2 刷新开源模型多项代码与 Agent 基准
deepDives.summary: GLM-5.2 成为首个在多项真实世界基准超越 60% 的开放权重模型，同时支持高效本地量化部署。

facts.text: GLM-5.2 在 Vibe Code Bench v1.1 得分 64%，领先下一开源模型 14 个百分点。
facts.quote: GLM 5.2 is the only open-weight model to break 60% on Vibe Code Bench v1.1... scores 64%, 14 percentage points ahead

facts.text: 2-bit 量化后模型体积从 1.51TB 降至 238GB，保留约 82% 精度。
facts.quote: The 2-bit model retains ~82% accuracy after we shrunk it from 1.51TB to 238GB (-84% size)

facts.text: AA-Briefcase 基准中 GLM-5.2 (max) Elo 1266，Claude Fable 5 领先至 1587。
facts.quote: Claude Fable 5 leads with Elo 1587, GLM-5.2 (max) at 1266

bullish.text: GLM-5.2 是目前最强开源模型，可直接在 Mac 上跑 coding agent

bullets.text: Cursor 新增 /automate 技能，支持自然语言配置 GitHub 触发器与计算机使用。
Claude Code Artifacts 支持团队共享交互式 PR 面板与实时仪表盘。
LangSmith Sandboxes 已与 Harbor 集成，支持更长周期 stateful agent evals。
Multi-LCB 将 LiveCodeBench 扩展至 12 种编程语言，暴露 Python 过拟合问题。
@code 团队完成 5 万次 5 行任务运行，揭示模型效率与工具使用洞见。
turbopuffer i8 向量将存储与查询成本降低 75%，基础价格从 $64 降至 $16/月。
bullets.quote: we cut our base price from $64 → $16/mo

bullets.text: Google TPU 从 v2 到 Ironwood 每 flop 能效提升约 30 倍。

topTweets.text: GLM-5.2 成为首个在 Vibe Code Bench 突破 60% 的开源模型

topTweets.author: @cursor_ai

topTweets.author: @hwchase17
topTweets.text: 推荐用 dcode harness 测试 GLM-5.2 等开放模型，避免 proprietary 偏差
topTweets.whyItMatters: 提供 model-agnostic 评估方案

topTweets.author: @ArtificialAnlys
topTweets.text: 发布 AA-Briefcase 基准，评估真实长周期 Agent 项目
topTweets.whyItMatters: 推动 agentic 知识工作评测标准

takeaways: GLM-5.2 量化版本已可在消费级硬件运行，AI 工程师可立即本地测试最强开源模型。
Agent harness（如 dcode、Harbor）正成为多模型公平评测与生产部署的标准工具。
向量数据库与 TPU 能效持续下降，推理与训练成本曲线继续改善。

items.author: @SemiAnalysis_
items.text: Investors have increasingly framed AI networking as a binary debate between copper and optics. ... Copper and optics serve different but complementary roles. ... Nvidia’s approach has been consistent: use copper where they can, and optics where they must.
items.whyItMatters: 澄清 AI 集群网络铜缆 vs 光模块互补关系，非二选一

items.author: @kimmonismus
items.text: Another exponential, the Artificial Analysis one. OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, xAI, Meta, DeepSeek, Alibaba, Mistral, Kimi and others are now clustered much closer together than two years ago.
items.whyItMatters: AI 模型性能差距快速缩小，竞争进入白热化阶段

items.author: @hwchase17
items.text: it is indeed quite good! don't try it in claude code/codex - those harnesses are overly tuned for their proprietary models dcode (deepagents code) is a model agnostic harness - try it there with @FireworksAI_HQ
items.whyItMatters: 介绍 model-agnostic 的 dcode harness，支持 GLM-5.2 等模型，避开 proprietary 调优限制。

items.author: @code
items.text: 📊 Sometimes the smallest evals reveal the biggest insights. See what 50,000 runs of a 5-line task taught the @code team about model efficiency, tool use, and AI behavior. 📖 Read the full post: https://code.visualstudio.com/blogs/2026/06/19/what-50000-runs-taught-us
items.whyItMatters: 50k runs 实测揭示模型效率与工具使用洞见

items.author: @togethercompute
items.text: GPT Image 2 from @OpenAI is now available on Together AI. Teams can now build image generation and editing into their multimodal apps through Together Serverless Inference.
items.whyItMatters: OpenAI 旗舰图像模型 GPT Image 2 上线 Together 推理平台

items.author: @HuggingPapers
items.text: Multi-LCB extends LiveCodeBench to 12 programming languages. Evaluate LLMs on competitive programming across Python, JavaScript, TypeScript, Java, C++, C#, Go, Rust, Ruby, PHP, Kotlin, and Scala.
items.whyItMatters: 多语言代码基准暴露当前模型 Python 过拟合问题

items.author: @github
items.text: With new generally available features in GitHub Copilot CLI, you can now ➡️ Speak to Copilot using on-device speech-to-text models ➡️ Use built-in Rubber Duck agent to help find blind spots with a second model
items.whyItMatters: Copilot CLI 新 GA 功能：语音输入 + 多模型 Rubber Duck agent

items.author: @AndrewYNg
items.text: Over the last two weeks, both the U.S. Government and Anthropic took significant actions that demonstrated their power to control access to AI by restricting what others can do with frontier models... Anthropic first released Claude Fable 5... This move represents a raw demonstration of power by Anthropic.
items.whyItMatters: 前沿模型访问受限，推动开源与主权AI讨论

items.author: @cloneofsimo
items.text: Together with researchers at Boston Children’s Hospital and Harvard, we published a study in NEJM AI showing how o3 Deep Research helped clinicians revisit previously unsolved rare pediatric disease cases...
items.whyItMatters: o3在罕见病诊断的真实临床应用案例

items.author: @Cloudflare
items.text: Today we're rolling out Temporary Accounts on Cloudflare Workers. Any agent can now run wrangler deploy — temporary and get a live Worker in seconds.
items.whyItMatters: Agent 可快速部署临时 Workers，加速自主工作流开发与测试。

items.author: @hxiao
items.text: inference capacity, inference capacity, plz focus on inference capacity @Zai_org and use your mighty Tsinghua network, scale test time compute!
items.whyItMatters: 强调测试时计算与推理容量对中国开源模型实用性的关键影响。

items.author: @nvidia
items.text: Jensen Huang’s simplest explanation of an AI agent: a worker in a workshop. The model thinks. The harness gives it form. Tools and skills let it act. And the runtime gives the agent a place to get work done.
items.whyItMatters: Jensen直观拆解Agent核心组件，指导工程落地

items.author: @OpenAINewsroom
items.text: For families facing rare genetic diseases, answers can be hard to find. @HallieJackson spoke live with @_perloj and Dr. Catherine Brownstein about the new NEJM AI paper and our work with Boston Children’s Hospital, where experts used o3 Deep Research...
items.whyItMatters: o3 Deep Research用于罕见病诊断的真实临床案例

items.author: @ThePrimeagen
items.text: Absolute game changing way to prompt agents. I add this to every prompt and have seen internal evals improve by over 23%... "You gotta be bad, you gotta be bold..."
items.whyItMatters: 简单 prompt 技巧让 agent evals 提升 23%，可立即测试

items.author: @ValsAI
items.text: GLM 5.2 is the only open-weight model to break 60% on Vibe Code Bench v1.1... scores 64%, 14 percentage points ahead of the next open-weight model... ranks #1 on multiple real-world benchmarks
items.whyItMatters: 开源模型 GLM 5.2 在代码构建 benchmark 上大幅领先，刷新 open-weight 记录

items.author: @saranormous
items.text: $INTC CEO @LipBuTan1 in new interview on his Foundry bet, and why we must make semis in the United States.
items.whyItMatters: Intel Foundry 战略与美国半导体制造，对 AI 硬件供应链关键

items.author: @cursor_ai
items.text: Introducing /automate, a skill for agents to set up automations for you. Describe your task in plain language. Cursor configures the triggers, instructions, and tools. We've also added GitHub triggers... plus computer use for cloud agents.
items.whyItMatters: Cursor 新增 agent 自动化功能，提升 AI 编码工作流效率

items.author: @ArtificialAnlys
items.text: Announcing AA-Briefcase, the benchmark for the next era of agentic knowledge work. Claude Fable 5 leads with Elo 1587, GLM-5.2 (max) at 1266. Realistic long-horizon projects with thousands of files.
items.whyItMatters: 新 agentic 知识工作基准发布，评估真实长周期项目表现

items.author: @OpenAI
items.text: This is an early step toward more robustly beneficial and aligned models: training models to carry beneficial traits into new situations... greater resistance to harmful fine-tuning.
items.whyItMatters: OpenAI 发布模型对齐新进展，提升安全性和可靠性

items.author: @UnslothAI
items.text: GLM-5.2 can now be run locally!🔥 The 2-bit model retains ~82% accuracy after we shrunk it from 1.51TB to 238GB (-84% size). Run on a 256GB Mac or RAM/VRAM setups. GLM-5.2 is the strongest open model to date. Guide: https://unsloth.ai/docs/models/glm-5.2 GGUF: https://huggingface.co/unsloth/GLM-5.2-GGUF
items.whyItMatters: GLM-5.2 开源权重本地量化运行，84% 体积压缩，AI 工程师可直接部署前沿模型。

items.author: @claudeai
items.text: New in Claude Code: Artifacts. Interactive pages built from your session, like a PR walkthrough or a living project dashboard, shared with your team at a private link. Available in beta on Team and Enterprise plans.
items.whyItMatters: Claude Code 新增 Artifacts 功能，支持团队实时协作交互页面，提升 coding workflow。

items.author: @GoogleDeepMind
items.text: Instead of assuming AI will always do what we intend, we ask: what if it doesn't? That’s why we’ve developed our AI Control Roadmap: a framework for building and managing the advanced AI we deploy within Google.
items.whyItMatters: DeepMind 发布 AI Control Roadmap，专注多代理系统安全协议，对 agent 开发有重要参考。

items.author: @code
items.text: 🤖 Bring your own AI models to @code! Connect models from providers you already use, run local models, and choose the right model for every workflow in VS Code. 📖 Read the full post: https://code.visualstudio.com/blogs/2026/06/18/byok-vscode
items.whyItMatters: VS Code 支持自带模型与本地模型灵活切换

items.author: @SakanaAILabs
items.text: Sakana AI research scientist Rujikorn (Tan) Charakorn recently presented Doc-to-LoRA at @MLCollective’s DLCT journal club, covering hypernetworks, cost amortization, and future directions.
items.whyItMatters: 超网络实现文档到 LoRA 即时适配，降低定制成本

items.author: @fchollet
items.text: Today, if you are paying for a fixed-price agentic coding subscription, any week you end below your weekly token quota represents a wasted resource. Utilize your token regeneration mechanic.
items.whyItMatters: Agentic coding 订阅下 token 利用率直接影响 ROI

items.author: @cohere
items.text: We just dropped three updates that make North Mini Code more accessible than ever ⬇️ The 4-bit quant is now available, making our first open-source agentic coding model small enough to be run on a Mac. ... North Mini Code is now supported on @ollama.
items.whyItMatters: 开源 agentic coding 模型更新，支持本地/Ollama 运行

items.author: @allen_ai
items.text: AISquared fine-tuned Bolt, a family of open-weight small language models, from Olmo. Domyn took a different route, building Domyn-Small, a 10B open-weight reasoning model... added 10.1 points to Domyn-Small on GPQA-Diamond
items.whyItMatters: 开源小模型微调 + GPQA 基准显著提升案例

items.author: @AndrewYNg
items.text: New course: Add voice to your AI agents and applications... You'll build three types of voice-enabled applications... Skills you'll gain: Add a voice layer to an existing agent without rewriting your prompts...
items.whyItMatters: 实用语音Agent构建课程，降低开发门槛

items.author: @danielhanchen
items.text: GLM-5.2 can now be run locally!🔥 The 2-bit model retains ~82% accuracy after we shrunk it from 1.51TB to 238GB (-84% size). Run on a 256GB Mac... GLM 5.2 dynamic 1-bit GGUF one shot Flappy Bird with 0 syntax errors whilst being 86% smaller!
items.whyItMatters: 最强开源模型本地量化，极大降低部署成本

items.author: @JeffDean
items.text: My @Google colleagues... recently wrote a paper... Google's Training Supercomputers from TPU v2 to Ironwood... ~30X more energy efficient per flop... 256 chips (TPUv2) to 9216 chips (Ironwood) per pod. Read the full paper:
items.whyItMatters: TPU五代演进，30倍能效提升，规模化训练参考

items.author: @figma
items.text: The Figma design agent, now with web search → Prompt the agent or paste a URL → Review results with linked citations → Insert content directly into your file
items.whyItMatters: Figma 设计 Agent 新增网页搜索与引用功能，提升 AI 辅助设计效率。

items.author: @Cloudflare
items.text: We break down the technical architecture behind our multi-stage vulnerability discovery harness and automated triage loop. Learn how we manage state controls, squash false positives through adversarial review, and route around LLM context limits.
items.whyItMatters: 详解 LLM 驱动漏洞发现 harness 架构，解决上下文限制与误报问题。

items.author: @fal
items.text: Rodin v2.5 is now live on fal! -PBR materials and HD textures -Production-ready 3D from text or up to 5 reference images -Quality tiers from 50K to 2M triangles
items.whyItMatters: Rodin v2.5 3D 生成模型更新，支持 PBR 与高分辨率纹理，生产就绪。

items.author: @ID_AA_Carmack
items.text: Paper review: You Don’t Need Strong Assumptions: Visual Representation Learning via Temporal Differences https://temporal-difference-vision.github.io/ ... The premise is that the more data you can use, the fewer inductive biases you should have.
items.whyItMatters: Carmack 深度解析视频时序差异表示学习论文，对自监督视觉模型有参考价值。

items.author: @turbopuffer
items.text:
new: i8 vectors

f32: 4 bytes/dim
i8: 1 byte/dim

4x fewer bytes → 75% lower storage and query costs + faster queries

when embedded with a quantization-aware model (e.g. voyage-4-large) trained on i8 vectors, recall loss can be ~0!

docs: https://turbopuffer.com/docs/performance
items.whyItMatters: 向量检索成本降低75%，支持大规模AI应用

items.author: @turbopuffer
items.text:
we cut our base price from $64 → $16/mo

start puffing for 4x less
items.whyItMatters: 向量数据库价格降至1/4，降低推理成本

items.author: @johnschulman2
items.text: PPO: rejected from NIPS 2017. PPO had a second wave in the LLM era for reasons unanticipated by the original paper - the importance-ratio objective fixes biases from numeric error, async training, and forward pass noise - the clipping objective affects entropy through a mechanism that we didn't know about at the time o
items.whyItMatters: PPO作者回顾其在LLM时代的意外复兴，揭示RLHF关键机制。

items.author: @nvidia
items.text: At VivaTech, we're sharing how France is turning AI ambitions into production reality. AI factories are coming online, open models are advancing, and agents are being deployed across industries...
items.whyItMatters: 欧洲AI工厂与Agent部署最新进展，含行业案例

items.author: @maximelabonne
items.text: LFM2.5-ColBERT-350M is a surprisingly reliable smart tool selector. We gave it 151 tools, and it consistently surfaces the 5 most relevant ones based on the user prompt. This saves tokens and improves accuracy. Ideal for hmmmm agentic edge models? 👀
items.whyItMatters: 350M小模型实现高效工具选择，适合边缘Agent

items.author: @poolsideai
items.text: someone asked if they could try getting Laguna M.1 running on a Mac. we said yes. they came back with a 3-bit MLX build running locally on Apple Silicon: ~26 tok/s, with ~100 GB peak memory on an M3 Max with 128 GB unified.
items.whyItMatters: Laguna M.1本地MLX量化部署实测，26 tok/s性能

items.author: @poolsideai
items.text: IYMI: the best way to try Laguna M.1 is to jump in the pool. pool is our agent harness. It works as both an ACP server and client, so you can run M.1 as a coding agent...
items.whyItMatters: 开源Agent harness，支持Laguna M.1 coding agent

items.author: @shannholmberg
items.text: one easy way to make any agent better, have a second model check its work... one model does the work, a model from a different lab reviews it before it moves on... gpt 5.5 xhigh running the loop and opus 4.8 checking the plan first, then every delivery
items.whyItMatters: 多模型 council 提升 agent 输出质量，易落地到 workflow

items.author: @Wauplin
items.text: `hf upload` got a full rewrite! Single-pass hashing, multi commits, resumable uploads. Same CLI, way faster, way cleaner. Available in hf latest release (1.20.0).
items.whyItMatters: Hugging Face Hub 上传工具重大升级，提升开源模型分发效率

items.author: @hwchase17
items.text: harbor is a great framework for running longer running, more stateful agent evals it underpins terminal bench 2 and is becoming industry standard LangSmith Sandboxes now integration with harbor!
items.whyItMatters: LangSmith 与 Harbor 集成，支持生产级 stateful agent evals，行业标准演进。

items.author: @GoogleResearch
items.text: New research published in @Nature with @GoogleDeepMind shows how AMIE utilizes long-context capabilities of Gemini models to ground its clinical reasoning in authoritative medical knowledge.
items.whyItMatters: AMIE 在 Nature 发表，展示纵向疾病管理推理能力

items.author: @OpenRouter
items.text: New lab: Cost Simulator A simple tool for looking at your real-world traffic and estimating cost savings with different models, using median endpoint pricing
items.whyItMatters: 新成本模拟工具，帮助工程师优化 LLM 推理开销

items.author: @weaviate_io
items.text: The most requested feature from our community is finally here: Weaviate Cloud access, free 𝘧𝘰𝘳𝘦𝘷𝘦𝘳. No trial period. No ticking clock. Just full access to Weaviate's vector database, query agent, and memory capabilities, no credit card required.
items.whyItMatters: 向量数据库 Weaviate Cloud 永久免费 tier 上线

items.author: @julien_c
items.text: Llama.cpp has a new branding + official website. Run local models today! Now more than ever, open source must win. 🙏 By @alekgrygier and @ggerganov at ggml/hf
items.whyItMatters: llama.cpp 官方新站上线，推动本地开源模型部署

items.author: @runwayml
items.text: New on the Runway API: Recipes. Drop production-ready generative media features into your platform, with one API call. Recipes are Runway-built endpoints with our prompting and workflow expertise packaged in. Polished results, without building or maintaining the workflow yourself. Create product ads from an image, swap
items.whyItMatters: Runway API 新增 Recipes，一键集成生产级生成媒体工作流

items.author: @wandb
items.text:
We just opened it up for anyone to try. It's an early experiment and still a little rough, so if your team runs more than one coding agent, kick the tires and tell us what's useful and what's missing.

Signup: https://hivemind.wandb.tools/

GitHub: https://github.com/wandb/hivemind
items.whyItMatters: 多coding agent协作平台HiveMind开放试用

items.author: @cartesia
items.text: Sonic-3.5 is also the #1 streaming TTS model on @voicearena_ai for notable languages including English🇺🇸, Hindi 🇮🇳, Portuguese 🇧🇷
items.whyItMatters: Sonic-3.5 登顶 Voice Arena 多语言流式 TTS 榜首，42 语言支持

items.author: @googleaidevs
items.text: Check out this quick overview of the @Antigravity ecosystem 🚀
items.whyItMatters: Antigravity 2.0 IDE/CLI/SDK 生态概览

items.author: @lmstudio
items.text: For WWDC, we worked with Apple to run Kimi K2.6, a 1T-parameter model, across a cluster of four Mac Studios using a preview version of LM Studio. We showcased secure remote access from a MacBook Neo and iPhone using LM Link. A glimpse of your own private, frontier-scale AI.
items.whyItMatters: 演示1T参数开源模型在消费硬件集群运行，推进本地前沿AI部署。

items.author: @GoogleAIStudio
items.text: create android apps in ai studio and run them on your phone a quick step-by-step guide by @patloeber:
items.whyItMatters: AI Studio 直接生成并在手机运行 Android 应用

items.author: @joshwoodward
items.text: 🇧🇷World-changing AI companies are coming from Brazil. That’s why we’ve officially expanded our Google AI Futures Fund to Brazil, partnering with venture capital leader Monashees to launch the Gama Fund. We’re looking for an elite cohort of deep tech founders and will offer: - Early access to Google DeepMind models -
items.whyItMatters: Google 扩展 AI 基金至巴西，提供 200 万美元投资与模型访问

items.author: @victorialslocum
items.text:
There's a difference between storage and actively maintained memory.

We just dropped a demo of 𝗘𝗻𝗴𝗿𝗮𝗺, @weaviate_io's memory service for AI agents.

It's a simple chat console, but watch what happens: • Every message you send gets ingested into an async extraction pipeline • Long-lived facts and conversation sum
items.whyItMatters: Agent主动记忆服务发布，解决长上下文遗忘

items.author: @XiaomiMiMo
items.text: 🚀 MiMo Claw is now live！
items.whyItMatters: 小米MiMo Claw Agent产品上线，支持办公自动化

items.author: @JayAlammar
items.text: GGUF quantized version now out kudos to @UnslothAI: https://huggingface.co/unsloth/North-Mini-Code-1.0-GGUF. The 30 billion parameter mixture of experts model stacks 49 Transformer blocks... The MoE layers have 128 experts, and activate 8 for each token. Leading to 3 billion active parameters.
items.whyItMatters: 分享30B MoE模型细节与量化版本，助力本地coding模型优化。

items.author: @UnslothAI
items.text: You can now run Kimi K2.7 Code locally! 🌘 We shrank the 1T model to 325GB (-48%) via Dynamic 2-bit... Run at >40 tok/s on 330GB RAM/VRAM setups.
items.whyItMatters: Kimi K2.7 Code 本地运行，支持高性能 coding/agent 任务，量化后效率大幅提升。

items.author: @cartesia
items.text: Two new models just dropped 👀 Sonic-3.5 and Ink-2 are the #1 streaming models for text to speech and speech to text
items.whyItMatters: 发布 #1 流式 TTS/STT 模型，语音 Agent 可用
